creator: patovm04@gmail.com
text:
I've been running Cinnamon too for a while, and most of its numerous little flaws on FreeBSD can be kinda easily solved/workarounded one way or another.

With regards to setting up a wallpaper, you can do the following:

gsettings set org.cinnamon.desktop.background picture-uri "YOUR WALLPAPER"

Hope it helps
